description_long: This is a rectangular, crimped-edge snack package with a predominantly purple and dark brown color scheme, featuring a glossy printed label on the front. The front displays the 'ASDA Extra Special' branding and highlights the product as '4 Triple Chocolate Cookies,' with additional text indicating they are baked in-store and prepared with Belgian chocolate. The packaging is made of flexible, semi-glossy plastic or laminated material, with visible creases and folds, suggesting it is lightweight and not rigid. The back of the package contains a white label with product and date information, as well as a description of the cookies. The sides are plain and dark, with the top sealed and folded over, typical of snack bags found in urban retail environments.
description: A crimped, purple and brown snack bag labeled 'ASDA Extra Special 4 Triple Chocolate Cookies,' made of flexible plastic with a glossy printed front and a white label on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main product branding, flavor description, and a large circular window area.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the dark, unadorned surface and the folded, crimped top of the package.
description_view_2: Back view with a white product label, barcode, and additional product description text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain, dark side and package folds.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'ASDA Extra Special' logo is visible on the front and back, featuring white text in a circular and rectangular arrangement on a dark background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front label clearly states 'Triple Chocolate Cookies' and includes images and text referencing chocolate.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A white label on the back contains product and date information, but no detailed nutritional facts panel is visible.
